title: JobsMod
description: Complete Server Mod with Jobs, Economy and Homes
body:
# **🎯 Main Features**
## 1️⃣ Jobs System

Players can choose a job to earn money and XP by performing specific actions:

- Mineur 🔨 — Mine blocks
- Bucheron  🪵 — Chop trees
- Fermier 🌾 — Harvest crops
- Chasseur 🏹 — Kill creatures
- Constructeur 🧱 — Place blocks

Progression system: Each level grants additional money and XP bonuses.

## 2️⃣ Currency System

Earn money by performing job-related actions.

Transfer money between players.

Display current balance.

## 3️⃣ Money Ticket System

Convert your money into physical items (custom heads) to carry or trade:

1 ticket = $100 (configurable)

Name can be changed in config

Can be stored in inventory

## 4️⃣ Homes System

Create teleportation home points:

First home is free

Price of additional homes increases exponentially

Maximum of 10 homes (configurable)

## 💻 Commands
### Jobs

```
/job                          # View all available jobs
/job join <name>              # Join a job
/job leave                    # Leave your current job
/job info                     # View your current info
/job info <name>              # View info about a specific job
/job stats                    # View all your levels
```


### Money / Currency

```
/balance                      # View your balance
/bal                          # Short alias of /balance
/money                        # View your balance (long command)

/money pay <player> <amount>  # Send money to a player
/money top                    # Richest players leaderboard (NEW)

/money exchange <amount>      # Convert money into tickets
/money redeem <amount>        # Convert tickets into money

```

### Homes

```
/home                         # Teleport to first home
/home <name>                  # Teleport to a specific home
/home set <name>              # Create/edit a home
/home list                    # View all homes
/home delete <name>           # Delete a home

```

## ⚙️ Configuration (JobsMod config.json)

You can modify all these parameters in the config.json file:


```
{
  "currency": {
    "name": "Dollar",
    "symbol": "$"
  },
  "tickets": {
    "name": "Ticket",
    "value": 100.0
  },
  "features": {
    "enable_jobs": true,
    "enable_money": true,
    "enable_homes": true
  }

  // ... other reward configurations
}

```

## 📊 Reward System

Each action gives:

Money (in dollars)

XP (experience to level up)

Example (Miner):

Stone: $5 + 2 XP
Coal: $10 + 5 XP
Iron: $20 + 10 XP
Diamond: $50 + 25 XP

## 🎁 Bonuses

Level bonus: +$100 each level (configurable)

Bonus every 2 levels: extra XP and money (configurable)

Progress bar: displayed in the action bar to track XP progression.
